graph-vault-migration.title: Graphbuilding Fusion P1 — markdown-vault migration round-trip
graph-vault-migration.problem_statement: The claim graph lives only as a sqlite db in a scattered dotdir (~/.graphbuilding/graph.db): not hand-editable, not git-tracked, and reads force repair + full recompute because the write path never guaranteed read invariants.
graph-vault-migration.jtbd: When I want to trust and hand-fix my claim graph, I want it stored as structured markdown I can edit and version, so I can rebuild a queryable index from it losslessly and stop re-mining on every read.
graph-vault-migration.user_context: Single-tenant fork owner (saris). Phase 1 of the multi-phase graphbuilding-fusion epic (docs/graphbuilding-fusion-design.md). Deep native rebuild on this repo's stack; the ~/.claude/skills/graphbuilding scripts are a behavioral oracle, not a copy target.

scope_map.metric: round-trip fidelity (binary): 9/9 tables byte-equal AND 5/5 gap species exact

metric.name: round_trip_fidelity
metric.baseline: 6/7 prior tables matched; aliases 834 exported -> 779 imported (55 dangling-FK rows dropped); 5/5 species reproduced
metric.target: 9/9 tables byte-equal (aliases 834=834) AND 5/5 gap species exact (frontier 65, debate 0, replication 473, coverage 49, white-space 312)
metric.user_value_check: a green round-trip means wiki/graph/ markdown is the hand-editable, git-tracked source of truth and the sqlite index rebuilds with zero loss
metric.keep_revert_rule: keep only if pytest is green AND source-db md5 unchanged; revert otherwise
metric.simplicity_criterion: one shared root() helper, no inline COALESCE(canonical_id,id) anywhere

acceptance_criteria.text: 9 tables round-trip byte-equal (per-row diff): papers 98, sections 789, paper_authors 97, entities 1444, predicates 46, claims 1052, entity_edges 543, citation_links 0, aliases 834
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k table_counts

acceptance_criteria.text: 5 gap species exact across the round-trip (frontier 65, debate 0, replication 473, coverage 49, white-space 312; total 899) — requires networkx for Louvain(seed=42)
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k gap_species

acceptance_criteria.text: Alias round-trip bug fixed: 834 exported -> 834 imported; all 55 dangling-FK alias rows preserved verbatim, no normalize/case-fold/silent dedup
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k alias

acceptance_criteria.text: root() helper handles chain (A->B->C => C, path-compress), cycle/self-loop (elect min id, refuse loop), dangling (return last live id, no crash); no inline COALESCE
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k root

acceptance_criteria.text: Source live db is never mutated: md5(copy) before == md5(copy) after the full round-trip; live db is only ever copied
acceptance_criteria.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k source_untouched

acceptance_criteria.text: gitignore correct: .vault-meta/graph/graph.db is ignored; wiki/graph/graph-export.json is tracked

Forward path documented (design only, not automated): wiki/graph/SCHEMA.md defines the frontmatter contract graph-ingest.py (P4) must write to, incl. a hand-authored paper/entity/claim example through graph-build.py
acceptance_criteria.verification: bash -c 'test -f wiki/graph/SCHEMA.md && grep -qi "frontmatter" wiki/graph/SCHEMA.md && grep -qi "forward path\|graph-ingest\|new paper" wiki/graph/SCHEMA.md'

tasks.title: pyproject.toml with PyYAML + networkx + pytest under uv; wiki/graph/ tree + .gitignore entry
tasks.verification: bash -c 'uv run python -c "import yaml, networkx" && git check-ignore .vault-meta/graph/graph.db'

tasks.title: scripts/graph-db.py: connect() (FK on), root() (path-compress, cycle/dangling-safe), typed insert helpers; no inline COALESCE
tasks.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k root

tasks.title: scripts/graph-export.py: db(COPY)->wiki/graph/ markdown + graph-export.json + SCHEMA.md; preserve ALL 834 alias rows incl. 55 dangling; ids preserved; source never written
tasks.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k 'source_untouched or alias'

scope_map.metric: AC3 alias export 834 + AC5 source untouched

tasks.title: scripts/graph-build.py: wiki/graph/->.vault-meta/graph/graph.db (derived); ids preserved; root() self-heals drift; re-insert all 834 aliases (derived aliases table must not reject dangling FK rows)
tasks.verification: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py -q -k 'table_counts or alias'

tasks.title: tests/test_graph_roundtrip.py: copy live db -> export -> build -> per-row 9-table diff + 5-species gaps diff + root() unit + source-untouched md5; skip if live db absent
AC8 forward-path doc in SCHEMA.md: contract graph-ingest.py (P4) must write to + hand-authored paper/entity/claim example through graph-build.py
